category_sources: Official README says Eternal Terminal is a remote shell that automatically reconnects without interrupting the session.
source_facts.description says Eternal Terminal is a remote terminal with IP roaming.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use Eternal Terminal; source_facts.name provides the executable/formula name et.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, configuration, and usage documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README supports remote shell, SSH, reconnect, and command-line usage tags.
source_facts.description supports terminal and IP roaming tags.
